abilities: My hand needs a knife in it.
No time for whinging. Move out!
Oi! Pick up your feet, ya' drongos!
Shake the grit outta' your knickers and move!
Woo! Let's go win this thing.
Time for the reckoning! (self and enemy)
chatter: My throne is where I say it is.
Are you lot ready for some bloodshed?
Before we go out there, I gotta' warn ya: I'm gonna yell at ya... a lot. Not because I don't like ya, or because I care , or any of that. It's just because... I'm really good at this.
Is this one a scrap or a heist? I wasn't listening. Heh, heh.
So, here the plan. Do what I do, listen to what I say. And don't screw this up!
The knife's called Gracie, the axe is Carnage... and me? Ha ha, I'm your Queen.
Alright, ladies. Let's teach these boys a lesson! * laugh * (with all female heroes on team; Lifeweaver also qualifies.)
Three bots, huh? You sure you even need any humans? (with three or more Omnics on team: Bastion , Echo , Orisa , Ramattra or Zenyatta )
Ugh, both brothers on the same team? Better make up before I smash your heads together. (with both Genji and Hanzo on team)
Behave yourself, Fawkes. I can still have you executed. (with Junkrat on team)
Doctor, have I really got to eat vegetables? It's like CRUNCH, CRUNCH, CRUNCH, how long have I got to chew these?! (with Mercy on team)
Let's see. We've got a bot, an angel, and the stupidest man alive. Does that put us ahead or behind? (with Bastion / Zenyatta , Mercy , and Junkrat as teammates)
Got any room in that mech, Champ? I wanna take some souvenirs. (with Wrecking Ball on team)
I think I'm getting another trophy for me throne room.
I don't like losing. You won't like it, either!
You wanna lose this? To them?!
Last chance to kick their teeth in!
This is the one that counts!
Beat me? Like hell you will!
Eh... I've got plenty of teeth left.
Looks like somebody wants the death penalty.
That's no way to treat your Queen!
Ya' only lose if you stay down.
A challenger! I like those. (after attaining a multi-kill in previous fight)
Eh, nobody reigns forever. (after attaining a multi-kill in previous fight)
Is my team asleep or what?
Where is everyone? I need someone to shout at!
Where the hell is the rest of my team?!
Hey! Time for the big finish!
You know it. I know it.
call-outs: The Junker Queen stands with ya.
Think you can take me? Let's find out!
Outnumbered? They've finally got a fair fight!
Ha ha ha ha! Who wants their guts handed to 'em?
None of ya can stop me!
Push 'em back or answer to me!
We're running out of time! Attack!
eliminations: Ha ha ha! And stay down!
You got too close, didn't ya'?!
Always wanted one of you in my collection! (eliminating Bastion )
Quit hiding behind your shield, big girl! (eliminating Brigitte )
Ya look better than you fight. Shame. (eliminating another Junker Queen )
*laugh* I warned you boys. Should have listened! (eliminating Junkrat or Roadhog )
Summer shack: avenged. (eliminating Junkrat or Roadhog )
Down you go, big man. (eliminating Reinhardt )
Put a dent in your armor there! (eliminating Reinhardt or Brigitte )
Hang with ratbags... die like ratbags. (eliminating Roadhog )
Aww, champ! You've gone soft. (eliminating Wrecking Ball )
Plenty of Carnage! What a wonderful day. (killing multiple enemies at once)
Ha ha! Loot 'em and let's go!
Did you think you had an edge? How embarrassing! (eliminating Nano-Boosted enemy)
*laughs* It's like bashing watermelons on a rope! (eliminating airborne enemy)
Like a bug on a windscreen! (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
No time for dramatic showdowns. We're scrapping here! (against Cassidy using Deadeye)
Aah! Put your little sword away! (against Genji using Dragonblade)
*laughs* Not gonna let a bloke in a spooky mask take me down! (against Reaper using Death Blossom)
Oi. Don't get clever with your Queen. (against Roadhog using Whole Hog)
*laughs* Nice lift, big girl! (assisted by Zarya using Graviton Surge)
I've taken naps harder than you!
One by one by one! Come on! Come on!
You know you're allowed to fight back, yeah?
Are any of ya' even trying?
Ha ha! You're makin' this too easy!
How many of you drongos are there?
Thanks for bunchin' up. Ha ha ha!
All dead? Hah, you call that a fight?!
That's it for them. Anyone wanna arm wrestle?
Ha ha ha! You should have finished the job, mate.
*grumble* Don't know why I saved you! (to Junkrat or Roadhog )
Ha! You call that a fight?
Ugh... c'mon, mate. Try to keep up!
Not sure even I could've done better!
Save some for the rest of us!
*laughs* Would you look at that? Ratjunk got a kill! (to Junkrat )
Show 'em what's what, Champ! (to Wrecking Ball )
interactions: Junker Queen : Have I seen you before? Ana : It's possible. I've passed through Junkertown once or twice. Junker Queen : You're the one who kicked Red Ned in the wicker basket! Ana : He started it.
Ashe : They make 'em all as big as you where you come from? Junker Queen : Nah. I was a special order.

Junker Queen : I fought a bunch of you Bastions once. You all had wheels and big sharp teeth. Bastion : (confused beeping) Junker Queen : On second thought, that might have been a dream I had... Bastion : (understanding beeping)
Junker Queen: You got a hamster in that mech? D.Va: Um... No? Junker Queen: Sure, sure... I'm watchin' you.

Junker Queen : Ain't easy, is it? Being in charge of killers and madmen. Doomfist : No. But I welcome the challenge. Junker Queen : We got a lot in common. Shame I'm gonna kill ya someday. Doomfist : *chuckle* Indeed.
Kiriko : Genji, remember the time you tripped over your sword in training? Junker Queen : Ha! Some ninja. Genji : It only happened once. Kiriko : Once was enough.

Junker Queen : Didn't I say I'd rip out your tongue if I saw you again? Junkrat : My Queen! Your voice, ever sonorous, is like a gentle waterfall upon my ears! Junker Queen : Right after the mission. Mark my words. Yeah. The ears are next.

Junker Queen: I've met mozzies with more brains than you, Fawkes. Junkrat: With all due respect, milady, I believe that's a knock against the Junkertown education system. Junker Queen: We've got an education system?
Junkrat: My exquisitous queen, I come bearing news of great import! Junker Queen: Not now, Ratjunk. Junkrat: My name's Junkrat! Junker Queen: No it isn't.
Lúcio : So, I'm tryna ask everyone this: what is your favorite animal? Junker Queen : Is there a kind of dingo that is... also a shark? Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Mauga : Where do I sign up for the Scrapyard ? Junker Queen : Fresh meat, eh? Well, try not to bore me. Mauga : Was just gonna say the same.
Ramattra: I hear you like to prey on omnics. Try me. Junker Queen: No thanks. Fought a bunch of ya before. You're a bit... gimmicky, no offense. Ramattra: Gimmicky? Junker Queen: I said, no offense!
Junker Queen: Mako, the Wreckers want you back. Thought you might like to know. Roadhog: *meaningful grunt* Junker Queen: Ha! They'll hate that. I'll pass it along.

Junker Queen : Are you, on average, more mechanical or more human? Sojourn : Why? Junker Queen : Tryna' figure out whether to scrap you for parts. Sojourn : Hm. Consider the railgun before you decide.

Junker Queen : I could've run Overwatch much better than you. Soldier: 76 : And what would you have done differently? Junker Queen : I would've caught all the bad guys, then cut their heads off! Soldier: 76 : Hmm... tempting.

Sombra : There's nothing about you in my files. No images, no documents...nothing. Junker Queen : Yeah, well, I'm-- what's the word? Starts with 'E'? Sombra : Enigmatic? Junker Queen : That's the one! And don't you forget it.
Junker Queen : What's the biggest axe you could make out of hard light ? Symmetra : A kilometer tall. But you would not be able to wield it. Junker Queen : Maybe you wouldn't.
Junker Queen : How many widows have you made? Roughly? Widowmaker : I do not keep track. Junker Queen : Well, I'm pretty sure I'm ahead.
Winston : Anyone wanna hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Junker Queen : Not unless you want that table broken over your head!

Junker Queen: Champ, I need ya to make me something else. Junker Queen: A robot guard dog for me dirt garden. Maybe it can fly, you decide. A suit of armor, right, but one that shouts my name. I need a slop bucket that's bulletproof, and don't you dare ask why! A grenade launcher with one trigger, three barrels. Paint, glitter, and nails. Wrecking Ball: He says, "Fine, but give me a challenge next time."
Junker Queen : You look like a bruiser. Wanna be my bodyguard? Zarya : Ha. I think you can take care of yourself.
map-specific: Wish one of those big underwater robots would attack. I don't need a mech to fight them.
A guitar isn't the only thing I shred. You're lucky I don't rip off your head!
I know sacrifice and I know pain... Ah, drat. I forgot the words again! Err... Time for the reckoning!
I don't see what's so fancy about Rome . Hardly any scrap heaps at all.
Portugal? Why on Earth are we in Portugal ?
My entire realm in plain view.
Ahh... How I've missed the smell of our plutonium springs.
This city's mine, and it's staying mine. (respawn)
Better find my subjects up to no good. They always get soft when I'm not around.
Yeah-e-eah, this is MY city! Don't you dare put a scratch on it!
Come on in, mind your head! If you wanna keep it.
Welcome to Junkertown!
Welcome to Junkertown! Home of the Queen!
Well, look who's entering my domain! Hmm... what's her name? From Overwatch ? (If Ana , Mercy , Tracer , or Sojourn are pushing)
Is that Junkrat at the gate again? Bloody hell! (If Junkrat is pushing)
Junkrat? How many times do I have to exile ya! (If Junkrat is pushing)
You're either braver or dumber than you look to come back here, Junkrat. (If Junkrat is pushing)
Hey you, pop star! No skating on me walls. I'm watching you. (If Lúcio is pushing)
Aww, why'd ya come back, Mako, I gotta kill ya or I'm gonna look soft! Uh— which... I'm not! (If Roadhog is pushing)
You can come in this time, Mako. But Junkrat had better not be with ya! (If Roadhog is pushing)
Is that a gorilla? With a lightning gun? In my city? Fantastic! (If Winston is pushing)
Glad you're back, Champ. Me throne leg needs fixin', it's gone all wobbly! (If Wrecking Ball is pushing)
Champ, you know better than to hang around those two clownfish. (If Wrecking Ball is pushing with Junkrat and Roadhog )
Hammond! I told you to murder Junkrat and Roadhog— not take 'em on a tour! (If Wrecking Ball is pushing with Junkrat and Roadhog )
Are you gonna let them deliver that payload? Come on!
Ooh! This is gonna be a good one! Scumbo, bring me my match snacks!
Oi! Junkers! They're at the gates of the Scrapyard ! Let's see if they've got what it takes!
Welcome to the Scrapyard! Where there's only one Champ, and plenty of chumps.
We gonna see some blood down there today or what?
Wrecking Ball is back to defend his title! And he better not disappoint me. (If Wrecking Ball is pushing)
C'mon, finish this! Me cheese bucket's almost empty!
Get over here, Six-Eyed Ted , you gotta see this!
Knock 'em down! Kick 'em in the— Urgh, spilled me backup jug...!
Push 'em back! Hit 'em with a brick!
Why am I not seeing more bloodshed?!
You call that a defense? Set fire to something!
You lot are slower than a dying doublecow! (if payload is stopped)
Your new champions! (once match has concluded)
Now where'd that doublecow get to? (once match has concluded)
